summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of E-commerce Intelligence & Decision Support System portfolio project. All backend APIs (100% success rate) and frontend functionality working perfectly.
passed_tests: All 7 backend API endpoints (dashboard KPIs, revenue, products, countries, segments, insights, chat)
Homepage with hero section, CTA buttons, feature cards, and stats
Dashboard KPI cards displaying correct values ($2.85M revenue, 15,847 orders, 8,932 customers)
Dashboard filters (date range, country, category) functional
All 4 dashboard charts rendering correctly (revenue over time, top products, sales by country, customer segmentation)
Insights page with 6 business insights and filter tabs (All, High, Medium, Low impact)
Assistant chat interface with suggested prompts and template responses
Architecture page with system components diagram and tech stack
About page with problem/solution sections and contact buttons
Mobile responsiveness with mobile menu and navigation
Template assistant responses working as expected
